---
title: "Lasso-1"
author: "Ruiqi Liu"
date: "2026-02-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Model
Model:
$$y=\sum_{i=1}^{10} \beta_j x_i+\epsilon.$$
Here $\beta_1=\ldots=\beta_3=3, \beta_4=\ldots=\beta_7=-2, \beta_9=\ldots=\beta_{10}=4$. We consider the penalty:
$$\lambda\sum_{j=1}^{9}|\beta_{j+1}-\beta_j|$$

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(CVXR)
set.seed(1)
n=1000
p=10
x=runif(n*p,0,5)
x=matrix(x,ncol = p)
b=c(3,3,3,-2,-2,-2,-2,4,4,4)*1
y=x%*%b+rnorm(n,sd=2)

beta=Variable(p)
loss=sum((y-x%*%beta)^2)/n
penalty=0
for (i in 2:p){
    penalty=penalty+abs(beta[i]-beta[i-1])
}



lambda=1
obj=loss+lambda*penalty
prob=Problem(Minimize(obj))
result=solve(prob)
result$getValue(beta)

lmod_ols=lm(y~x-1)
lmod_ols$coef
```
